category_sources: Official Logtalk homepage describes it as a declarative object-oriented logic programming language extending Prolog.
source_facts.description says Logtalk is a declarative object-oriented logic programming language.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the Logtalk name.
docs_sources: Official Handbook is hosted on logtalk.org.
Official Logtalk documentation page links to the Handbook and API documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/LogtalkDotOrg/logtalk3; per instruction, repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official documentation page covers Handbook, APIs, developer tools, and Prolog integration scripts.
source_facts.description identifies a declarative object-oriented logic programming language.
